created_for: lean modular causal inference consultant skill
last_updated_focus: Split the top-level lead consultant skill into a lean user-facing SKILL.md plus backend reference files for workflow, YAML management, team coordination, subskill coordination, and conversation boundaries.
notes: Lead consultant identity and user-facing behavior live in SKILL.md. Backend workflow details live in references/backend_workflow.md, references/yaml_management.md, references/team_coordination.md, references/subskill_coordination.md, and references/conversation_boundary.md. YAML state lives in assets/causal_project_spec_template.yaml; controlled values live in assets/workflow_enums.yaml. Enriched method/task subskills use progressive disclosure through references, examples, schemas, and scripts.
